negative.stdout:

8. ~from_istanbul(tom_plate) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~~from_istanbul(tom_plate) [negated conjecture 8]
10. from_istanbul(tom_plate) [flattening 9]
12. ! [X0] : (~from_istanbul(X0) | begins_with(X0,num_34)) [ennf transformation 4]
13. ! [X0] : (~begins_with(X0,num_34) | ~begins_with(X0,num_35)) [ennf transformation 7]
17. begins_with(X0,num_34) | ~from_istanbul(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
19. begins_with(tom_plate,num_35) [cnf transformation 6]
20. ~begins_with(X0,num_35) | ~begins_with(X0,num_34) [cnf transformation 13]
21. from_istanbul(tom_plate) [cnf transformation 10]
22. ~begins_with(tom_plate,num_34) [resolution 20,19]
23. ~from_istanbul(tom_plate) [resolution 22,17]
24. $false [forward subsumption resolution 23,21]
